Video.summary: 302 SBF vs. 305 SBC battle: We're increasing compression on both, comparing gains head-to-head!
Video.title: 302 vs 305 Pt 3 High Compression Showdown

Video.summary: We're building a 427ci pump-gas LSx for a Music City Trucks C10, aiming for serious hot rod power.
Video.title: 427ci LSx Part 1

Video.summary: We're finishing our 427ci LSx engine for Music City Trucks' C10, adding EFI and dyno-tuning it.
Video.title: 427ci LSx Part 2

Video.summary: We're twin-turboing our 600+ HP 427ci Small Block Chevy with new EFI, pushing "Baby Blue" to the limit!
Video.title: Twins for the Win

Video.summary: Our Small Block Chevy cracked during a cold snap. So we’re going to put the guts in a bigger block.
Video.title: Compression Obsession: A Bigger Block

Video.summary: Once we finish assembly on our improved Compression Obsession SBC, we’ll run this mule on the dyno.
Video.title: Compression Obsession: More Power

Video.summary: We tear down Project Spartan to rebuild it, but its surprisingly strong engine changes our plans.
Video.title: Kaiser Jeep Chaos

Video.summary: Chris tests a new welder on Project Spartan's roll cage while Eric inspects the motor.
Video.title: The Kaiser Gets a Roll Cage

Image.alt: The Kaiser Gets a Roll Cage
The Kaiser Gets a Roll Cage
The Kaiser Gets a Roll Cage

Video.summary: Chris and Eric battle the truly insane rust in Project Spartan's '69 M715 Kaiser Jeep cab.
Video.title: Our 1960s Jeep is a Rust Bucket

Image.alt: Our 1960s Jeep is a Rust Bucket
Our 1960s Jeep is a Rust Bucket
Our 1960s Jeep is a Rust Bucket

Video.summary: Chris and Eric are tackling Project Spartan axles and turbocharging the Polaris UTV for off-road adventures.
Video.title: Axles, Tires and Turbo, Oh My!

Image.alt: Axles, Tires and Turbo, Oh My!
Axles, Tires and Turbo, Oh My!
Axles, Tires and Turbo, Oh My!

Video.summary: Our 305 Small Block Chevy and 302 Small Block Ford return for another round of the brand loyalty war.
Video.title: Small Block Showdown Round 4

Video.summary: We visit UNOH where we build and dyno a brutal 434ci UMP Modified dirt track engine.
Video.title: 434ci UMP Race Engine

Video.summary: Chris Ryan's "Scarlet Lady," a custom '56 Continental Mark II, embodies truly extraordinary craftsmanship.
Video.title: Chris Ryan - Scarlet Lady

Video.summary: We put custom touches on our 496ci Stroker Big Block and get it ready for the street rod life!
Video.title: 496ci Stroker Big Block Chevy

Video.summary: We build the foundation of a stroker LS that would be a PERFECT fit for a hot rod!
Video.title: Pro LS Bottom End Build

Video.summary: We complete our stroker LS powerplant and put it to the ultimate performance test in the dyno cell!
Video.title: Pro LS on the Dyno

Video.summary: A real Cinderella story, our ’69 Charger needs a lot of work to make it to the ball.
Video.title: 1969 Hard Charger Hellcat

Video.summary: Prepare to be floored by this 1946 Dodge Power Wagon resto-mod from Vintage Dream Machines.
Video.title: Power Wagon

Video.summary: Behold "Outlaw" VIN #1! Mustang Brothers' supercharged '67 Fastback is a Brittany Blue beast.
Video.title: Mustang Brothers

Video.summary: We reinforce our Slant Six with a fully-forged rotating assembly.
Video.title: High Tech Slant Six

Video.summary: We give our Slant Six a huge induction upgrade, a custom EFI system, and a turbocharger.
Video.title: High Tech Slant Six Gets Boosted

Image.alt: High Tech Slant Six Gets Boosted
High Tech Slant Six Gets Boosted
High Tech Slant Six Gets Boosted

Video.summary: E85 fuel promises high-octane performance for almost any engine. We put it to the test.
Video.title: High Compression SBC on E85

Video.summary: Our Big Block Chevy gets ready for life inside a high-revving hot rod.
Video.title: Hot Rod Big Block Chevy

Video.summary: Today we’ll show you the 5 most common reasons your engine won’t start...and how to fix it!
Video.title: Top 5 Reasons Why Your Engine Won’t Start

Image.alt: Top 5 Reasons Why Your Engine Won’t Start
Top 5 Reasons Why Your Engine Won’t Start
Top 5 Reasons Why Your Engine Won’t Start

Video.summary: Pat & Frankie upgrade internal components to make our blue oval beast more durable under boost.
Video.title: Beefing Up Our 460 Big Block Ford

Image.alt: Beefing Up Our 460 Big Block Ford
Beefing Up Our 460 Big Block Ford
Beefing Up Our 460 Big Block Ford

Video.summary: We start a new project, taking a 1972 Camaro Split Bumper and turning into a powerhouse race car.
Video.title: Road Course Camaro Part 1

Video.summary: Our 1972 Camaro gets outfitted with a custom roll cage to help strengthen the chassis.
Video.title: Road Course Camaro Part 2 Roll Cage Fabrication

Image.alt: Road Course Camaro Part 2 Roll Cage Fabrication
Road Course Camaro Part 2 Roll Cage Fabrication
Road Course Camaro Part 2 Roll Cage Fabrication

Video.summary: Building a big block bow tie classic on a shoestring budget.
Video.title: 454 Budget Build

Video.summary: Chevy vs. Ford in a horsepower battle of the big blocks.
Video.title: 454 Power Build

Video.summary: Making a modern day muscle car with 454-powered 1985 Monte Carlo.
Video.title: 454 meet '85 Monte Carlo

Video.summary: What started as a simple “aerosol overhaul” gets more complicated!
Video.title: AMC-Powered Postal Jeep

Video.summary: The Carcass shop starts the suspension work on our ’72 road course Camaro.
Video.title: Road Course Camaro Part 3 Race Suspension Install

Image.alt: Road Course Camaro Part 3 Race Suspension Install
Road Course Camaro Part 3 Race Suspension Install
Road Course Camaro Part 3 Race Suspension Install

Video.summary: Modifying the firewall of the Road Course Camaro to fit the new engine and transmission.
Video.title: Road Course Camaro Part 4 Firewall Fabrication

Image.alt: Road Course Camaro Part 4 Firewall Fabrication
Road Course Camaro Part 4 Firewall Fabrication
Road Course Camaro Part 4 Firewall Fabrication

Video.summary: To make our '72 Chevy Camaro lighter we'll need to shed some weight.
Video.title: Road Course Camaro Part 5 Carbon Fiber Body Modifications

Image.alt: Road Course Camaro Part 5 Carbon Fiber Body Modifications
Road Course Camaro Part 5 Carbon Fiber Body Modifications
Road Course Camaro Part 5 Carbon Fiber Body Modifications

Video.summary: The roll cage on our 1972 Camaro is welded up, now it's time to reattach the roof.
Video.title: Road Course Camaro Part 6 Roof Top Extension

Image.alt: Road Course Camaro Part 6 Roof Top Extension
Road Course Camaro Part 6 Roof Top Extension
Road Course Camaro Part 6 Roof Top Extension

Video.summary: Our '72 Camaro is in the shop to start shedding some weight.
Video.title: Road Course Camaro Part 7 Carbon Fiber Installation and Rear Assembly

Image.alt: Road Course Camaro Part 7 Carbon Fiber Installation and Rear Assembly
Road Course Camaro Part 7 Carbon Fiber Installation and Rear Assembly
Road Course Camaro Part 7 Carbon Fiber Installation and Rear Assembly

Video.summary: Our rear axle needs new mounting points for our shocks, so we fabricate new brackets.
Video.title: Road Course Camaro Part 8 Rear Axle and Brake Mockup

Image.alt: Road Course Camaro Part 8 Rear Axle and Brake Mockup
Road Course Camaro Part 8 Rear Axle and Brake Mockup
Road Course Camaro Part 8 Rear Axle and Brake Mockup

Video.summary: The Carcass Crew jumps back on their 1972 Camaro, metal working the damaged core support.
Video.title: Road Course Camaro Part 9 Front Clip Fabrication

Image.alt: Road Course Camaro Part 9 Front Clip Fabrication
Road Course Camaro Part 9 Front Clip Fabrication
Road Course Camaro Part 9 Front Clip Fabrication

Video.summary: The guys show you how to create a custom steering column for your race car that won’t break the bank.
Video.title: Road Course Camaro Part 10 Custom Dash Panel

Image.alt: Road Course Camaro Part 10 Custom Dash Panel
Road Course Camaro Part 10 Custom Dash Panel
Road Course Camaro Part 10 Custom Dash Panel

Video.summary: We fabricate the rear window setup, then address the plumbing for our dry sump oil pump on the Camaro.
Video.title: Road Course Camaro Part 11 Plumbing Problems

Image.alt: Road Course Camaro Part 11 Plumbing Problems
Road Course Camaro Part 11 Plumbing Problems
Road Course Camaro Part 11 Plumbing Problems

Video.summary: The guys measure for the pylons for their new wing. Plus, get the ’72 Camaro ready for test and tuning.
Video.title: Road Course Camaro Part 12 Aerodynamic Advantage

Image.alt: Road Course Camaro Part 12 Aerodynamic Advantage
Road Course Camaro Part 12 Aerodynamic Advantage
Road Course Camaro Part 12 Aerodynamic Advantage

Video.summary: We add a few vital parts to the '72 Camaro by installing the fuel system and working on the cooling system.
Video.title: Road Course Camaro Part 13 Final Systems Check

Image.alt: Road Course Camaro Part 13 Final Systems Check
Road Course Camaro Part 13 Final Systems Check
Road Course Camaro Part 13 Final Systems Check

Video.summary: The '72 Camaro gets stripped down for a fresh coat of paint and a race-ready wrap.
Video.title: Road Course Camaro Part 14 That's A Wrap

Image.alt: Road Course Camaro Part 14 That's A Wrap
Road Course Camaro Part 14 That's A Wrap
Road Course Camaro Part 14 That's A Wrap

Video.summary: We bring in a Datsun 280Z and take a look at how it handles on the road.
Video.title: Datsun 280Z Heritage Build Part 1

Video.summary: We start tearing into the powertrain of our Datsun 280Z.
Video.title: Datsun 280Z Heritage Build Part 2

Video.summary: We upgrade our 280Z's suspension to give it better handling.
Video.title: Datsun 280Z Heritage Build Part 3

Video.summary: The Carcass crew makes body modifications to our 1978 280Z that take on some JDM styling cues
Video.title: Nissan 280Z Heritage Build Body Mods and Paint

Image.alt: Nissan 280Z Heritage Build Body Mods and Paint
Nissan 280Z Heritage Build Body Mods and Paint
Nissan 280Z Heritage Build Body Mods and Paint

Video.summary: We put the last few pieces on our 1978 Datsun 280Z project, adding exhaust and fuel injection.
Video.title: Nissan 280Z Heritage Build Assembly and Payoff

Image.alt: Nissan 280Z Heritage Build Assembly and Payoff
Nissan 280Z Heritage Build Assembly and Payoff
Nissan 280Z Heritage Build Assembly and Payoff

Video.summary: A '78 Postal Jeep gets a second chance.
Video.title: Special Delivery

Video.summary: Our '78 Postal Jeep gets an upgraded suspension that can handle the trails.
Video.title: Junk Mail Suspension

Video.summary: We start the reassembly of our '78 Postal Jeep.
Video.title: Mail Jeep Resurrection

Video.summary: The guys make room on Junk Mail for bigger wheels and tires.
Video.title: Junk Mail Body Mods

Video.summary: We start the final push getting Junk Mail one step closer to the trail.
Video.title: Junk Mail Cooling and Fuel Plumbing

Image.alt: Junk Mail Cooling and Fuel Plumbing
Junk Mail Cooling and Fuel Plumbing
Junk Mail Cooling and Fuel Plumbing

Video.summary: Neither snow nor rain nor heat nor gloom of night will keep our guys from their special delivery.
Video.title: Mail Jeep
